overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a modern waterfront urban promenade. The character moves past a large contemporary glass building with distinctive purple lighting, transitioning from an open plaza into a covered walkway lined with palm trees and construction barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern waterfront plaza with stepped building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide concrete plaza beside a modern glass building with purple accent lighting

entered.detail: large contemporary building with reflective glass windows and concrete structural elements
distinctive purple illuminated section of the building's upper facade
wide stepped entrance leading up to the building's main doors
tall palm trees lining the edge of the promenade
multi-lane road running parallel to the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide open plaza next to a striking modern building featuring purple accent lighting. The area is empty of pedestrians, with palm trees visible in the distance along the road, and the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to multi-lane road with passing traffic

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the same direction on the right side
bus passes by on the right side of the road traveling in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian and approaching the road where vehicles are moving

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction, overtaken by ego character
bus driving along the road, passing from behind and moving ahead

entered.detail: curved concrete overhang of the building beginning to extend over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza onto a sidewalk adjacent to the road, passing a pedestrian and watching a bus drive by. The distinctive purple lighting of the building disappears from view as the character approaches the building's overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under building overhang with construction barriers

events.description: entering the shadow of the building overhang, lighting becomes noticeably darker and cooler

agents.ego_description: walking under the building's overhang into a darker, sheltered area with construction equipment visible

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers and wooden boards blocking off a section of the building

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath the building's curved overhang, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadow. Red construction barriers line the left side of the path as the character continues forward under the shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep covered walkway with ATM and construction equipment

events.description: passing red and white construction barriers and an ATM machine on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the deep covered section, passing an ATM and construction barriers

entered.detail: red ATM kiosk with signage on the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper under the building overhang where the lighting is significantly darker. An ATM machine becomes visible on the left among the construction barriers as the character approaches the end of the covered section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban plaza into the shadowed depths of a modern building's covered walkway. It begins by following a character past a striking contemporary building accented with purple lighting, moving across a wide, empty plaza toward a distant line of palm trees. As the character steps onto the sidewalk, the purple glow fades from view while a bus drives past and a lone pedestrian crosses the path. The scene then shifts from bright sunlight into deep shadow as the camera enters a curved overhang, where red construction barriers begin to line the left side of the walkway. Finally, the environment grows significantly darker as the character moves deeper under the shelter, passing an ATM machine nestled among the barriers toward the end of the covered section.
